msgs.text:
I read the prompt and the 26-turn proposal log as external proposals. The prompt fixes the submission syntax: distinguished sigma,tau, implicit tame relation tau^sigma=tau^2, later generators in the pro-2 core, and exponents reduced modulo M=85667662080.

The prior log convincingly kills the early scalar and fixed-П„вҲ’2 candidates; the only live candidate is the dynamic tame-inertia word from Turns 9вҖ“26.This is also consistent with the literature boundary: the known JannsenвҖ“Wingberg strategy is formation-theoretic over finite tame subextensions, while DiekertвҖҷs dyadic result is not a direct K=Q2 solution.Numdam+2 EuDML+2

The surviving candidate remains:variables sigma,tau,x,y definitions nx = (x*tau^50932630783)^40491355905 ny = (y*tau)^40491355905 relations x*sigma^45176306175*x*sigma^40491355905*x^-1*nx*ny^sigma*y^-1

Equivalently, with ПҖ=ПҖ2 and О·=2ПҖ on prime-to-2 tame inertia,r=xПғвҲ’ПҖxПғПҖxвҲ’1(xП„вҲ’О·)ПҖ ((yП„)ПҖ)ПғyвҲ’1.

The constants are still ПҖвүЎ40491355905,вҲ’ПҖвүЎ45176306175,вҲ’О·=вҲ’2ПҖ вүЎ50932630783(modM).My new check was the next cyclotomic layer in the first genuinely tamely ramified case, (e,f)=(3,2). Prior Turn 26 proved, or at least strongly argued, that for every tame quotient the sign kernel should have abelianization ker(Оә)abвү…Z22ef+1вҠ•C4.That only checks the field after adjoining i. The next test is whether the quadratic extensions of that sign-kernel field have the expected unique О¶8 -branch.

For О”3,2=вҹЁПғЛү,П„ЛүвҲЈП„Лү3=1,ПғЛү2=1,ПғЛүП„ЛүПғЛүвҲ’1=П„Лү2вҹ©, I rewrote the candidate by ReidemeisterвҖ“Schreier. Using the finite approximation ПҖвүЎ33 modulo 3 and 32, sufficient to detect C8 -torsion, the pro-2 kernel U has 13 generators and 6 relators. The sign character isОә(Xg)=Оә(Yg)=1,Оә(S)=0.For V=kerОә, the sign-kernel presentation has 25 generators and 12 relators. Its abelianized Smith form over Z2 has one nonunit factor 4, soVabвү…Z213вҠ•C4,as Turn 26 predicts.The new part is that I enumerated all index-two subgroups of V. SincedimF2

V/ОҰ(V)=14,there are214вҲ’1=16383 nontrivial quadratic characters. For each one, I performed a second ReidemeisterвҖ“Schreier rewrite and reduced the resulting abelianized matrix over Z2. The outcome was:numberВ ofВ index-twoВ subgroupsВ W<V 163821Wab freeВ rank2525 2-primaryВ torsionC4C8 This is exactly the local-class-field-theoretic pattern expected after adjoining i: among the quadratic extensions of the degree-12 field L(i), exactly one adjoins О¶8, and all have free rank 24+1=25.

The unique C8 -producing character has a particularly simple form in the sign-kernel Schreier presentation with transversal {1,X0,0}: it is supported on all twelve Y-lifts and on no X- or S-lift. In symbols, it is the character ПҮ(0:Ya,b)=ПҮ(1:Ya,b)=1forВ aвҲҲ{0,1},В bвҲҲ{0,1,2},and zero on the other Schreier generators. This is a useful structural clue: the Ој8 -branch is still concentrated in the same invariant вҖңY-orientationвҖқ direction, while the nontrivial tame-inertia blocks contribute only unit Smith pivots.

I also checked stability of the C8 character after raising the approximation to ПҖвүЎ129 modulo 3 and 64; the same all-Y-lift character still gives the nonunit valuation 3. So this is not an artifact of the first finite approximation.This does not prove the presentation. It does, however, extend the prior evidence in a way that Turn 26 had not done: the candidate now passes the first ramified next-cyclotomic test, not just the sign-kernel C4 test itself. The remaining gap is still the full dyadic formation/rigidity theorem: matching all filtered Пғ,П„-actions selected by the relation with arithmetic over every finite tame subextension.

ESTABLISHED: The dynamic candidate remains unrefuted. New this turn: for the genuinely tamely ramified quotient (e,f)=(3,2), the sign kernel V has Vabвү…Z213вҠ•C4, and its 16383 index-two subgroups have exactly the expected distribution 16382вӢ…C4 and 1вӢ…C8, all with free rank 25. The unique C8 branch is the all-Y-lift character.

GAP: This is still not a complete presentation proof. The decisive missing step is a uniform dyadic formation/rigidity theorem identifying the candidateвҖҷs full filtered tame action, including ПғПҖ - and П„вҲ’2ПҖ -effects, with the arithmetic action for every finite tame subextension.

NEXT: Prove the above C4/C8 index-two distribution uniformly for all (e,f), by decomposing the second sign-kernel ReidemeisterвҖ“Schreier matrix into the invariant Y-orientation block plus nontrivial tame-inertia unit blocks.[BREAKTHROUGH]
